Bash(git -C /home/abc/Programming/RETAIND commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix TypeScript type inference for Supabase tables

Added Relationships field to all table definitions in database.types.ts
to fix type inference issues with @supabase/supabase-js v2.97.0.

This resolves the TypeScript error where beta_contacts table insert
operations were incorrectly typed as ''never''.

Changes:
- Added empty Relationships: [] to all table definitions
- Added proper foreign key relationship for user_organisations -> organisations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
